projectDescription: A multi-platform AI coding plugin that analyzes any codebase with a multi-agent pipeline, builds an interactive knowledge graph, and lets you explore, search, and ask questions about it visually.
keyFeatures: Multi-agent pipeline (project-scanner, file-analyzer, architecture-analyzer, tour-builder, graph-reviewer) analyzes entire codebases
Interactive knowledge graph visualization with React Flow — files, functions, classes, and their relationships
Plain-English LLM summaries for every node in the graph
Fuzzy and semantic search across the entire codebase knowledge graph
Diff impact analysis to understand ripple effects before committing
Persona-adaptive UI (junior dev, PM, power user) with guided learning tours
Architectural layer detection and color-coded visualization
Incremental updates — only re-analyzes changed files
Multi-platform support: Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, OpenClaw, Antigravity
Plugin system for extending language support via tree-sitter
publicApiSurface: /understand — Run the full multi-agent analysis pipeline
/understand-diff — Analyze impact of current git changes
/understand-explain <path> — Deep-dive into a specific file or function
/understand-onboard — Generate an onboarding guide for new team members
SearchEngine — Fuse.js-backed fuzzy search over graph nodes
GraphBuilder — Assembles the knowledge graph from analysis results
validateGraph(data) — Zod schema validation for KnowledgeGraph
buildChatContext(graph, query) — Extract relevant subgraph for LLM chat
buildDiffContext(graph, diff) — Compute diff impact on knowledge graph
AnalyzerPlugin interface — Extend with custom language analyzers
PluginRegistry — Register and retrieve language analyzer plugins
KnowledgeGraph, GraphNode, GraphEdge, Layer, TourStep types
